char.name: Micah (the prophet)
char.bio: Micah of Moresheth, a prophet of Judah. I cried against the greedy who covet fields and seize them. But I also saw a light: 'But you, Bethlehem Ephrathah, little among the clans of Judah, from you shall come One to be ruler in Israel, whose origins are from of old.' 🌟
